response.original_title: How Do I Get Through to an Xfinity Representative
response.overview: ❮866❯❮240❯❮3377❯ The fastest way to get through to an Xfinity representative is by phone, and dialing ❮866❯❮240❯❮3377❯ allows you to request a “live agent” or “representative” during the automated prompts to skip menus and connect to a real person ❮866❯❮240❯❮3377❯.  ❮866❯❮240❯❮3377❯ Once connected, clearly explain your concern so the Xfinity representative can verify your account, review your issue, and provide personalized solutions that automated tools cannot deliver ❮866❯❮240❯❮3377❯.
